betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Comforts§f

§aRest and skip the storm during long excursions without losing your way home!§f
The §9Comforts§f mod introduces portable sleeping gear — §9Sleeping Bags§f and §9Hammocks§f. Unlike standard beds, sleeping in these items does §cnot§f reset your spawn point, allowing you to venture far into deep wilderness, oil reserves, or mine shafts, sleep through the dangerous hours, and still respawn safely at your main base.

§6Sleeping Bag & Hammock Mechanics§f:
§b• No Spawn Anchor§f: Sleep anywhere without losing your home base coordinates. Perfect for high-risk industrial mapping and scouting.
§b• Auto-Deploy§f: Placed sleeping bags are §aautomatically used upon placement§f, allowing for immediate safety from nearby hostiles.
§b• Breakage Hazard§f: Light travel-gear isn't indestructible. Sleeping bags have a §c5% chance to break upon usage§f, so always pack a spare for long adventures.
§b• Night & Day Sleep§f: Standard hammocks transition the day, but they are also configured to §aallow sleeping through the night§f, giving you complete time control.

§6How to Set Up a Hammock§f:
1. §bPrepare the Support§f: Find two sturdy blocks (like wood logs or pillars) placed exactly §a4 blocks apart§f.
2. §bAttach the Anchor§f: Place two pairs of §9Rope and Nails§f on the inner faces of the support blocks, facing each other.
3. §bHang the Hammock§f: §9Right-click§f the rope and nails with your colored §9Hammock Cloth§f to suspend it, and §9right-click§f it again to take a comfortable nap.
